title: Show payment option only after an order is placed (pay the order charge)

requirements.text: Remove the standalone product payment CTA from the Products section so users are not prompted to pay before placing an order. Keep the existing “Order Now” behavior that scrolls to the order form.

quotes: Don't put the payment option separate, after placing order then for give payment option to pay order charge.

acceptanceCriteria: On the customer landing page, product cards no longer show a “Pay with Razorpay” / “Try Again” / “Pay Again” payment flow.
The “Order Now” button still scrolls the user to the order form section.
No Razorpay checkout can be initiated directly from the Products section.

requirements.text: After a customer successfully places an order via the Order Form, display a payment option to pay the placed order’s total charge using Razorpay. The payment UI must clearly reference the newly created order (e.g., show the order ID and amount) and provide success/cancel/error feedback states.

quotes: Don't put the payment option separate, after placing order then for give payment option to pay order charge.

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the order form calls the existing backend createOrder API and the UI captures the returned Order (including orderId and totalAmount).
After order creation succeeds, the UI shows a “Pay now” action for that order, using the exact order total amount.
Payment status messages are shown for: processing, success, cancelled/dismissed, and error (all user-facing text in English).
If the Razorpay key is unavailable, the pay button is disabled and an English error/help message is shown.

requirements.text: Add backend APIs to associate a Razorpay payment success with an existing order and update the order’s paymentStatus accordingly, so the frontend can mark an order as paid after Razorpay checkout succeeds.

quotes: after placing order then for give payment option to pay order charge.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a shared method that accepts (orderId, razorpayPaymentId) and updates the stored order.paymentStatus to #paid for that order.
The method enforces that only the order’s customerPrincipal or an admin can mark the order as paid.
If orderId does not exist, the method traps with a clear error message.
No changes break existing order creation and admin order listing behavior.

requirements.text: Wire the post-order payment flow end-to-end: on Razorpay success, call the backend to mark the corresponding order as paid, then update the UI state to reflect payment success for that order.

quotes: after placing order then for give payment option to pay order charge.

acceptanceCriteria: On Razorpay successful payment callback, the frontend calls the new backend method with the created orderId and received razorpay_payment_id.
After the backend call succeeds, the UI reflects that the order payment is paid (and no longer shows a pending pay action for that same order in the post-order panel).
If the backend call fails after a Razorpay success, the UI shows an English error message instructing the user to contact support/admin with the order ID and payment ID.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead).
Do not edit immutable frontend hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/main.tsx).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Implementing Razorpay server-side order creation/signature verification (keep the current client-side checkout approach).
Adding new third-party authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.
Building a separate standalone payment page/section outside the post-order flow.
